steps.title: See the example relationship
steps.content: The passage says the World Cup used to be smaller and more geographically limited. The next sentence gives the 1950 tournament as a specific case with only 13 teams from Europe and the Americas.

steps.title: Reject other signals
steps.content: Choice A signals an additional point, not an illustration. Choice B signals contrast, but the 1950 detail supports the prior claim. Choice C signals final arrival or culmination.

steps.title: Choose illustration
steps.content: For example correctly introduces the 1950 World Cup as a concrete instance of the tournament being smaller and more geographically limited. The answer is D.
